ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case report */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the case report */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the case was reported */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "released" INTEGER /* Number of released patients */,
  "deceased" INTEGER /* Number of deceased individuals */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the case report (e.g., hospital, testing center) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms associated with the case */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the case (e.g., mild, severe, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_province FOREIGN KEY ("province") REFERENCES provinces ("province_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the province per square kilometer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province where the hospital is located */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the hospital */,
  "staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff members in the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_centers" (
  "testing_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing center */,
  "testing_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the testing center */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province where the testing center is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Daily testing capacity of the testing center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_centers_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the patient is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the health official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the health official */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the health official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the health official (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the health official (e.g., epidemiology, public health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case report */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the report is associated with */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health official who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was submitted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the case report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case report that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., outbreak, cluster) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES case_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health official who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the visualization is associated with */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., map, chart, graph) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the forecast is associated with */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was generated */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the log was generated */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_tracing" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who had contact with the individual */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date the contact occurred */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., close, casual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_tracing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy took effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)
